name: Quiche in a Green Chile Shell
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Whole Green Chiles (use 2 4-oz cans of green chiles and drain each can)
4 oz Monterey Jack Cheese (about 1 cup shredded)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Generously grease a 9-inch pie plate that is 1 1/4-inches deep.
3. Cook and stir the sausage in a skillet until done; drain on paper towels.
4. Cut a lengthwise slit in each chile and open them up.
5. Arrange the chiles on the bottom and sides of the pie plate to form a shell.
6. Sprinkle with the cheese and sausage.
7. Beat the eggs slightly, then beat in the milk and pepper.
8. Pour the mixture into the chile-lined pie plate.
9. Bake, uncovered, until a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean (about 30 minutes).
10. Let stand for 10 minutes before cutting.
